do_not_use_when: You want any voice, authorship, or AI-provenance inference (this surface refuses it)
Target is under 300 words (the length floor)

artifacts: stdout markdown report (default), --json envelope, or --out PATH

purpose: Descriptive structural/formatting profile of a document — heading cadence, section-length variance, list/blockquote/code/link/table usage. A publishing-format fingerprint, not stylometry: emits measurements only (no band, no verdict) and refuses voice/authorship/AI inference.
use_when: You want a structural profile of how a blog / Substack / policy / memo document is laid out
You're comparing formatting conventions across documents or media
